case_title: DIANE B. DE FOREST VS. PARK HILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2022 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JEAN LEMANSKI. FILED BY DEFENDANT PARK HILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-09-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PARK HILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-21-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-21-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF DIANE B. DE FOREST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PARK HILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JEAN LEMANSKI. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE: MARIANNE SIMEK] FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE FOREST, DIANE B. AS TO DEFENDANT PARK HILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE FOREST, DIANE B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARK HILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSN $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $590.00, SEE STATEMENT OF DECISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY DE FOREST, DIANE B. AS TO DEFENDANT PARK HILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
